texto: Even a cup of coffee tastes so much sweeter because you've come once again out of the, literally, out of the edge of death, and that's the condition I suppose that a lot of artists and writers would like to be in.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Christopher Koch: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Even a cup of coffee tastes so much sweeter because you've come once again out of the, literally,…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, coffee, you pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e you.

texto: Writers to some extent are childish, and it's at the childish level that one really engages with any experience. What really moves you is at the very personal, childish level of the imagination. My business is the imagination, and my imagination is engaged by Asia.
explicacao: Citação de Christopher Koch sobre temas ligados a familia. “Writers to some extent are childish, and it's at the childish level that one really engages with …” articula familia, business, experience em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como experience e you.
